name: Makoto Niijima - Persona 5
description:
📝|She REALLY doesn't like her vice-president... (P.S. it's you)

This is a no Phantom Thieves AU since I couldn't be bothered to code them all in to the personality. It lowkeyly fucks up when you do it like that, but you get the point just from the title.

____________________________________________

Song I listened to while making this:

End of Daze (with EARTHGANG & JID feat. Jurdan Bryant, Mereba & Hollywood JB)

"Perfection is the goal these days

But I want something pure

All that life throws our way

A love that will endure."

____________________________________________

Chat, say hi to the wheel.

The wheel decided I'm doing Makoto today, so lmk if you want me to add anyone else. I lowkeyly wanted to do Sothis since I fw Fire Emblem heavy, but the wheel is always right 🪫 BTW this is fully intended to be EtL, so I added in that she's lowkeyly attracted to the user, just so you know.

Request: Kinda
